statement: Anthropic's Claude models are now generally available in Microsoft Foundry, running in production on NVIDIA GB300 (Blackwell Ultra) GPUs in Microsoft Azure.
why: A frontier lab's flagship models reaching general availability on current-generation Blackwell Ultra inside a major hyperscaler is a concrete production-demand data point for merchant datacenter GPUs.

impact.mechanism: Production GA deployment of Claude on GB300 pulls through Blackwell Ultra GPU demand via Azure.

evidence.excerpt: Anthropic's Claude models in Microsoft Foundry — hosted on Microsoft Azure and running on NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPUs — are now generally available
